## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? How would it improve accessibility?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other information, references or examples that might help.
